steps.step: Install Viper, Cobra and other core dependencies in cli/cjtCli
Create basic folder structure: internal/core/config, cmd
Define Config models (AppKey, EncryptCode, AppMode, LogLevel, etc.)
Implement Manager interface and Profile loading logic
Write unit tests for profile loading and switching
Write unit tests for config watching and reloading
Verify default path generation on different OS (darwin, linux, windows)
